text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One morning, while I'm out on a<n>leisurely stroll...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
G-good morning, Cafe! Are you also<n>going to
train?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Curious. So you wish to conquer the<n>rising sun?!
Hats off to you! Who<n>knew you had the makings
of a lead<n>actress?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I... don't know what you're talking<n>about... but I
think... I wouldn't<n>compare myself... to you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! It goes without saying!<n>Both you and
Doto are brilliant and<n>undeniable catalysts to my
shine.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, it follows that you two<n>would be star
material yourselves!<n>Bask in my resplendence
and shine<n>brilliantly! Come, let us run together,
hand-in-hand, on this fine morning!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
U-um, Opera O? Cafe has already<n>gone off on her
own.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, she has the tendencies of a<n>feline. Turn
away for just a second<n>and she's vanished,
gracefully and<n>nimbly.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. Plus, she seems—how should Iput this... She looks focused, likeshe's chasing something with allher heart.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
D-do you think that it could be the<n>rumored,
invisible Friend of hers?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! A feline's friend would be<n>a feline as
well! Even if one cannot<n>see the other, their
footsteps<n>pitter-patter in tandem!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, we shan't fall behind. Let us<n>make haste,
Doto! Over yonder, to<n>where the light shines!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: C-coming!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
This early in the morning and they're<n>already
bursting with energy. I silently<n>offer my words of
encouragement<n>and watch as they disappear into
the<n>distance.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
At night, as I finish up work and start<n>to head
home, I come across<n>Manhattan Cafe resting.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that I saw her with T.M.<n>Opera O and
Meisho Doto this<n>morning.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: They are... good friends... with each<n>other.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
They push each other... to be better...<n>They're
different... from my Friend<n>and me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm always... on the receiving end... I<n>have...
nothing to give to my Friend...<n>or anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I don't know a thing<n>about this
"friend" she always talks<n>about. But people with
clear goals<n>become the target many strive<n>toward.
That alone means she has<n>something to give.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: After... I passed you... my Friend was<n>still ahead...

text_block_list.name: Bright-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I see... I gotta admit, that's a little<n>frustrating.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One could say the frustration that girl<n>felt will
become a source of<n>motivation. And it would all be
thanks<n>to Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Phew... I should head back... to the<n>track...
choice_data_list: You're really gonna run more laps?
You're really gonna run more laps?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. Just... a few more...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She looks tired. I should convince her<n>to get some
rest.
choice_data_list:
What if you turn in early and continue tomorrow
morning?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...You're right.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Do you have... someone you want to...<n>catch up
to?
choice_data_list: Well, I have quite a lot of rivals actually.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I see. Must be nice... to have<n>someone... as your
equal... Someone<n>who inspires... and is inspired by
you.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Showing a soft smile, Manhattan<n>Cafe disappears
into the dark of the<n>night.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I will keep running... day or night... as<n>long as I see
my Friend... up ahead...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I will catch up... then proudly tell her...<n>that I'm her
rival.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With a slight bow of the head,<n>Manhattan Cafe
returns to the track. I<n>hear her whisper "sorry for
the wait"<n>seemingly to no one.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No... I'm not...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, I can see that<n>her legs
look slightly unsteady.
choice_data_list: You have to be in top shape.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Like that one time, someone might<n>ask to train
together with her. If she<n>isn't fit to run when that
happens...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That isn't... a problem. I just want to...<n>catch up
to... my Friend...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Manhattan Cafe heads<n>back
towards the track.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes look longingly towards<n>something
invisible to my eyes.
